instructions.context: Read the most recent iMessage reply from Carlos. Match the reply to the proposals in .github/agent-memory/idea-proposals.json using these rules: if the reply is a number (e.g. 1, 2, 3), select the corresponding proposal; if the reply is none, mark all proposals as rejected; if the reply is unrecognisable, set status to needs_clarification and stop.

format.name: [matched idea name]
format.portugal_focus: [true if this idea had the portugal_focus flag, false otherwise]

on_success.then: commit and push — message: chore: idea approved by Carlos [skip ci]
on_success.special_case:
After writing approved-idea.json, read founder-agent.json to get the real local_path and founder_name values and send Carlos an iMessage: '✅ Got it — idea approved and saved.

Run me once more in Claude Code from the repo folder to kick off bootstrap:

  cd [local_path]
  claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -p "$(cat .github/genesis-prompt.md)"

I will pick up where we left off and build the business.

— [founder_name]'

on_none.action: append all proposals from idea-proposals.json into .github/agent-memory/rejected-proposals.json (create file if it does not exist). Both files use the same array-of-objects format. Add 'rejected_at' (ISO timestamp) and 'rejected_by' (set to 'Carlos') to each entry before appending. Then delete idea-proposals.json so the Founder agent knows to generate a fresh batch. Set this queue item status to completed.
on_none.then: commit and push — message: chore: idea batch rejected, archived to rejected-proposals [skip ci]

on_no_reply.action: exit cleanly — do not modify any files, do not commit
on_no_reply.note: Reply not yet received. Mac Runner will retry on next scheduled run.
